publishedAbstract: The ODF routes in the openshift-storage namespace, namely routes `s3` and `ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore` are failing the routes-protected-by-tls compliance check as described [here](https://github.com/ComplianceAsCode/content/blob/master/applications/openshift/networking/routes_protected_by_tls/rule.yml). For Example: ~~~ # oc get routes--all-namespaces-o json | jq '[.items[] | select(.spec.tls.insecureEdgeTerminationPolicy!= null) | select(.spec.tls.insecureEdgeTerminationPolicy | test("^(^$|None|Redirect)$"; "") | not) |.metadata.name]' ["ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore", "s3"] ~~~ But when we patch these routes, the value is immediately overwritten by the operator. How can we modify the ODF operator to set the routes in the `openshift-storage` namespace to None or Redirect?
publishedTitle: ODF Routes unable to be patched to pass compliance rule routes-protected-by-tls
